mapper.select:
SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M070', 'BID', 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS TYPE , 'BID' AS RFX_TYPE , HD.BUYER_CD ,getBuyerNames(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, 'BID', HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, null, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , HD.ANN_NO , HD.ANN_ITEM , HD.ANN_DATE , HD.CONT_TYPE1 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M301', HD.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE1_LOC , HD.CONT_TYPE2 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M302', HD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE2_LOC , HD.CONT_TYPE3 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M303', HD.CONT_TYPE3, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE3_LOC , SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 3, 2) AS APP_BEGIN_DATETIME , SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 3, 2) AS APP_END_DATETIME ,(CASE WHEN ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) AS BID_STATUS , HD.BID_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM , HD.ESTM_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.ESTM_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS ESTM_USER_NM , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT ,(ES.SIGN_STATUS,'') AS SIGN_STATUS ,(HD.ESTM_TYPE,'ES') AS ESTM_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) AS BID_STATUS_LOC , HD.BID_STATUS AS BID_STATUS2 ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM -- 2021.07.02 : 예정가격 결재 승인에 대한 SMS 수수료 추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = HD.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.BID_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , HD.BID_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_BID_BATCH_PRC' '@@' HD.GATE_CD '@@' HD.BUYER_CD '@@' HD.BID_NUM '@@' HD.BID_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , 'STOCBDHD' AS CONT_TBL_ID FROM STOCBDHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND HD.BID_STATUS NOT IN ('9999', '2303') AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (HD.ESTM_TYPE,'ES') != 'ES' -- 예가 생략 아니것
UNION ALL
SELECT GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M070', HD.RFX_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS TYPE , HD.RFX_TYPE , HD.BUYER_CD ,getBuyerNames(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, 'RFX', HD.RFX_NUM, HD.RFX_CNT, null, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , HD.RFX_NUM AS ANN_NO , HD.RFX_SUBJECT AS ANN_ITEM ,(HD.SIGN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS ANN_DATE , HD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE AS CONT_TYPE1 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M301', HD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE1_LOC , 'LP' AS CONT_TYPE2 ,(CASE WHEN HD.RFX_TYPE = 'RPC' or HD.RFX_TYPE = 'RCA' or HD.RFX_TYPE = 'RFQ' or HD.RFX_TYPE = 'RYQ' THEN NULL ELSE GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M301', 'LP', 0, #{ses.langCd}) END) AS CONT_TYPE2_LOC , HD.AMT_TYPE AS CONT_TYPE3 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M303', HD.AMT_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE3_LOC ,(RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS APP_BEGIN_DATETIME ,(RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS APP_END_DATETIME ,(CASE WHEN ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) AS BID_STATUS , HD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM , HD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS ESTM_USER_NM , HD.RFX_NUM AS BID_NUM , HD.RFX_CNT AS BID_CNT ,(ES.SIGN_STATUS,'') AS SIGN_STATUS ,(CASE WHEN (HD.EST_PRICE_TYPE,'0') = '1' THEN 'SE' ELSE 'SE' END) AS ESTM_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) AS BID_STATUS_LOC , HD.PROGRESS_CD AS BID_STATUS2 ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM -- 2021.07.02 : 예정가격 결재 승인에 대한 SMS 수수료 추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = HD.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.CTRL_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , HD.CTRL_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_RFQ_BATCH_PRC' '@@' HD.GATE_CD '@@' HD.BUYER_CD '@@' HD.RFX_NUM '@@' HD.RFX_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , 'STOCRQHD' AS CONT_TBL_ID FROM STOCRQHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.RFX_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.RFX_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.RFX_CNT = '1' AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (HD.EST_PRICE_TYPE,'0') != '0' -- 예가 생략 아니것 ) A WHERE (SIGN_STATUS, 'T') IN ('T', 'C', 'R') -- 예가 결재상태 : 작성중, 상신취소, 반려 AND TO_DATE(APP_END_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') BETWEEN SYSDATE AND SYSDATE + (2/24) + (10/(24*60))

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M070', 'BID', 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS TYPE , 'BID' AS RFX_TYPE , HD.BUYER_CD ,getBuyerNames(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, 'BID', HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, null, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , HD.ANN_NO , HD.ANN_ITEM , HD.ANN_DATE , HD.CONT_TYPE1 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M301', HD.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE1_LOC , HD.CONT_TYPE2 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M302', HD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE2_LOC , HD.CONT_TYPE3 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M303', HD.CONT_TYPE3, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE3_LOC , SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 3, 2) AS APP_BEGIN_DATETIME , SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 3, 2) AS APP_END_DATETIME ,(CASE WHEN ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) AS BID_STATUS , HD.BID_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM , HD.ESTM_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.ESTM_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS ESTM_USER_NM , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT ,(ES.SIGN_STATUS,'') AS SIGN_STATUS ,(HD.ESTM_TYPE,'ES') AS ESTM_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) AS BID_STATUS_LOC , HD.BID_STATUS AS BID_STATUS2 ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM -- 2021.07.02 : 예정가격 결재 승인에 대한 SMS 수수료 추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = HD.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.BID_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , HD.BID_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_BID_BATCH_PRC' '@@' HD.GATE_CD '@@' HD.BUYER_CD '@@' HD.BID_NUM '@@' HD.BID_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , 'STOCBDHD' AS CONT_TBL_ID FROM STOCBDHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND HD.BID_STATUS NOT IN ('9999', '2303') AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (HD.ESTM_TYPE,'ES') != 'ES' -- 예가 생략 아니것
UNION ALL
SELECT GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M070', HD.RFX_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS TYPE , HD.RFX_TYPE , HD.BUYER_CD ,getBuyerNames(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, 'RFX', HD.RFX_NUM, HD.RFX_CNT, null, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , HD.RFX_NUM AS ANN_NO , HD.RFX_SUBJECT AS ANN_ITEM ,(HD.SIGN_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS ANN_DATE , HD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE AS CONT_TYPE1 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M301', HD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE1_LOC , 'LP' AS CONT_TYPE2 ,(CASE WHEN HD.RFX_TYPE = 'RPC' or HD.RFX_TYPE = 'RCA' or HD.RFX_TYPE = 'RFQ' or HD.RFX_TYPE = 'RYQ' THEN NULL ELSE GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M301', 'LP', 0, #{ses.langCd}) END) AS CONT_TYPE2_LOC , HD.AMT_TYPE AS CONT_TYPE3 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M303', HD.AMT_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE3_LOC ,(RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS APP_BEGIN_DATETIME ,(RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS APP_END_DATETIME ,(CASE WHEN ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) AS BID_STATUS , HD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM , HD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS ESTM_USER_NM , HD.RFX_NUM AS BID_NUM , HD.RFX_CNT AS BID_CNT ,(ES.SIGN_STATUS,'') AS SIGN_STATUS ,(CASE WHEN (HD.EST_PRICE_TYPE,'0') = '1' THEN 'SE' ELSE 'SE' END) AS ESTM_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END) AS BID_STATUS_LOC , HD.PROGRESS_CD AS BID_STATUS2 ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM -- 2021.07.02 : 예정가격 결재 승인에 대한 SMS 수수료 추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = HD.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.CTRL_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , HD.CTRL_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_RFQ_BATCH_PRC' '@@' HD.GATE_CD '@@' HD.BUYER_CD '@@' HD.RFX_NUM '@@' HD.RFX_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , 'STOCRQHD' AS CONT_TBL_ID FROM STOCRQHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.RFX_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.RFX_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.RFX_CNT = '1' AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (HD.EST_PRICE_TYPE,'0') != '0' -- 예가 생략 아니것 ) A WHERE A.BID_STATUS_LOC = '0' AND (CASE WHEN A.CONT_TYPE2='QE' THEN 'E' ELSE A.SIGN_STATUS END, 'T') = 'E' AND TO_DATE(A.APP_END_DATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') BETWEEN SYSDATE AND SYSDATE + (2/24) + (10/(24*60))
